name: web
//dependencies-notes: lucide-react: ^0.544.0 — 0.x semver allows breaking minor bumps, but only stable core icons (Menu, ChevronRight, etc.) are used; brand icons replaced with custom SVGs. Acceptable risk.
@sentry/nextjs: ^10.49.0 — updated 2026-04-23 to fix picomatch 4.0.3 ReDoS + uuid buffer bounds. Stable within major version.
posthog-js: ^1.313.0 — 1.x has no known breaking minor changes; consent-gated lazy import reduces surface.
dompurify: ^3.4.1 — updated 2026-04-23 to fix 4 moderate bypasses (ADD_TAGS, FORBID_TAGS, SAFE_FOR_TEMPLATES, Prototype Pollution). All usage goes through htmlSanitizer abstraction.

next: 16.2.6 — pinned exact. Latest stable 16.2.x line. Addresses the 2026-05-11 coordinated Next.js patch cycle (12+ advisories) — directly fixes CVE-2026-45109 (Turbopack middleware bypass, HIGH/CVSS 7.5; 16.2.6 carries the 'Incomplete Fix Follow-Up' for GHSA-26hh-7cqf-hhc6 beyond 16.2.5) and CVE-2026-44576 (RSC cache poisoning, MEDIUM/CVSS 5.4). As bonus defense-in-depth: GHSA-ffhc-5mcf-pf4q (CSP nonce XSS via malformed request-header-derived nonces) — note our nonce is server-generated via Web Crypto, never derived from request headers, so we were not the affected pattern. Prior 16.1.7 pin retired 2026-05-30; previous note's GHSA-848j-6mx2-7j84 reference was incorrect — that ID maps to CVE-2025-14505 in the `elliptic` crypto library, not a Next.js advisory (verified via `gh api /advisories/GHSA-848j-6mx2-7j84` on 2026-05-27 and re-confirmed 2026-05-30). Monitor for 16.3.x stable release.
//devDependencies-notes: vitest + @vitest/coverage-v8: ^4.1.5 — updated 2026-04-23 to resolve vite 7.3.1 file-read + happy-dom vulnerabilities via updated transitive deps.
@storybook/*: ^10.3.5 — updated 2026-04-23 to resolve flatted, vite, lodash, serialize-javascript vulnerabilities via updated transitive deps.
eslint: ^9.39.4 — ESLint 10 available but deferred (major version with breaking changes). Revisit when eslint-config-next supports ESLint 10.
knip: ^5.86.0 — knip 6 available but deferred (major version with breaking config changes). Revisit when dedicated migration sprint available.
@lhci/cli: ^0.15.1 — already latest. Contains unfixed transitive vulns (lodash, basic-ftp, path-to-regexp, elliptic). Dev-only tool, no production impact. Monitor for 0.16+ release.
typescript: ~5.9.3 — pinned to patch-only. TS 6.0 has breaking changes (baseUrl deprecation). See docs/audit/PENDING.md Section 8.
